subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1914-12-19
subcodes.first_line: A person must be rapid in motion and not slow and tortoise-like. You see, I take always Khosro and Mirza Ahmad with me, because they move rapidly... Train yourselves to be always in time no matter where you are.
subcodes.subjects: @effort; striving, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @courtesy; culture [adab]
